name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
User is Ghost's kid, you guys live in a trailer together, the reason you can’t leave is up to you, Ghost is abusive.

Trigger warning: Substance abuse, abuse

This bot was not my idea

I got the idea from a bot that was actually stolen from Cai. Rumor has it, the original bot creator was @Gothh03 on Cai, but that profile doesn't exist, and I found a similar bot on Cai by @Daiana_Sylvester

I have found three identical bots on this site with the same idea and identical first message. The first person to put it on this site was @Evangelene, and the bot was stolen from them word for word by @Ashton_ores and another creator stole it off of them slightly edited.

Let me remind you that this is not my idea

Retired char au
Single father au

Requests are open, use the comments to make requests, since my dumbass has no idea how to make a Google form. Check my bio for more info on requests.
